tasks.title: Checkpoint: Review Schema
tasks.description: User approval required before continuing. Review the schema phase results.
tasks.user_prompt:
Review the generated Prisma schema.

Please verify:
- All entities are correctly defined
- Relations between entities are correct
- Field types and constraints are appropriate
- Indexes are defined where needed

Approve to continue with API generation.

  POST /api/v1/users/{userId}/favorite-contacts — Add favorite contact

  PUT /api/v1/users/me/chat-background — Set user default chat background
  GET /api/v1/users/{id}/preferences/theme — Get user theme preference
  PUT /api/v1/users/{id}/preferences/theme — Update user theme preference
  GET /api/v1/users/me/language — Get user language preference
  PUT /api/v1/users/me/language — Update user language preference
  GET /api/v1/users/{userId}/away-message — Get user's automatic away message configuration
  PUT /api/v1/users/{userId}/away-message — Create or update user's automatic away message configuration
  DELETE /api/v1/users/{userId}/away-message — Disable and remove user's automatic away message configuration
  GET /api/v1/users/{userId}/greeting-settings — Get greeting settings
  PUT /api/v1/users/{userId}/greeting-settings — Update greeting settings
  GET /api/v1/users/{id}/accessibility-settings — Get accessibility settings
  PUT /api/v1/users/{id}/accessibility-settings — Update accessibility settings
  GET /api/v1/users/{userId}/preferences/typography — Get user typography preferences
  PUT /api/v1/users/{userId}/preferences/typography — Update user typography preferences
  GET /api/v1/users/{userId}/power-settings — Get user battery settings
  PUT /api/v1/users/{userId}/power-settings — Update user battery settings
  GET /api/v1/users/{id}/preferences/localization — Get user localization preferences
  PUT /api/v1/users/{id}/preferences/localization — Update user localization preferences
  GET /api/v1/users/{userId}/regional-formats — Get user regional format preferences
  PUT /api/v1/users/{userId}/regional-formats — Update user regional format preferences
  POST /api/v1/users/{userId}/blocks — Block a contact
  GET /api/v1/users/{userId}/blocks — List blocked contacts
  DELETE /api/v1/users/{userId}/blocks/{contactId} — Unblock a contact
